_about: Assumptions behind Honey's CO2 estimate. Edit freely.
_engine: Faithful port of EcoLogits v0.8.2 (genai-impact/ecologits, MIT). scripts/eco_report.py runs the real package for an authoritative breakdown.
_params_note: SPECULATIVE — no lab discloses parameter counts. active/total are best-guess billions from tier/pricing. Change them and the badge updates.
_grid_note: Per-provider, since they run in different clouds: Anthropic on AWS Trainium (Project Rainier PA/IN/MS ~500), OpenAI on Azure US (~400), Google on GCP (cleaner ~330). Location-based; market-based (renewable PPAs) would be lower.
_savings_note: Token reduction vs a no-Honey baseline. 'full' = 0.57 from the README benchmark (Opus 4.8, 20 tasks x3). lite/ultra are estimates.
